workLog.detail: Ran /spec on issue #1951. Step 0 PASS. PRD produced via requirements-interview (12 ACs, EARS syntax). Tier 2 classification. Step 9 APPROVED after Q4 wedge revision and two critic passes. REQ-008, DESIGN-008, TASK-008, INTERVIEW-1951 artifacts written.

Ran /plan on REQ-008. Five milestones: M1 skill contract verification, M2 spec.md insert (2 commits), M3 check 9d, M4 static tests, M5 validation. Two critic passes; four surgical fixes applied. Plan persisted at .agents/plans/active/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate.md.

Verified chestertons-fence, memory, exploring-knowledge-graph SKILL.md exist. Documented invocation contracts at .agents/plans/active/req-008-m1-skill-contracts.md. Branch feat/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate created.

94b50b6f: spec artifacts (REQ-008, DESIGN-008, TASK-008, INTERVIEW-1951, session log, episode). Committing plan artifacts next (req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate.md, req-008-m1-skill-contracts.md, STEP-0-METRICS.md).

Gate 5 DX review found 2 HIGH + 3 MED findings: DESIGN hours table boundary contradicted REQ strict-less-than rule; TASK line 225 worked example self-contradicted; AC-09 deferral text differed across files; sequence diagram missing halt arrow; topic normalization incomplete for multi-word entities. All 5 fixes applied. 2 LOW findings deferred to M2.

Inserted Step 0.5 scaffold into .claude/commands/spec.md between Step 0 closing rule (line 140) and Step 1 numbered list (now line 267). Covers AC-01 through AC-08: heading order, ProvisionalTier mapping tables, topic extraction with 4-step normalization, 3-skill invocation sequence, depth-table for knowledge-graph, degradation rules, entity adjudication with auto-mode and human-mode thresholds, PriorArtBlock 3-subsection schema. Includes guard string <!-- step0.5:incomplete-without-2b --> for AC-12 false-positive prevention until 2B lands.

Added halt criteria section (H6-H11), step0_5-halt block format (5 fields, info-string, parser contract), supplemental Phase 5 hook with phases_needed formula, STEP-0.5-METRICS.md tally directive with examples and archival policy. Removed <!-- step0.5:incomplete-without-2b --> guard string. M2 complete; spec.md grew from 199 to ~340 lines.

Appended Check 9d (Prior Art / Constraints elicitation) to Step 9 pre-mortem list. 9d FAIL conditions: (a) section absent; (b) all 3 subsections empty without coverage note; (c) guard-string still present (Step 0.5 partial). Updated Step 9 narrative to reference 9a/9b/9c/9d. 9a/9b/9c bodies untouched per plan.

Wrote tests/commands/step0_5_parser.py (compute_provisional_tier + section extractors) and tests/commands/test_spec_step0_5.py (S1-S12 plus parametrized parser cases). 30 tests pass. Fixed 8h-tier contradiction (REQ/DESIGN/spec.md prose): 8h is Tier 3 per mapping; parenthetical aligned. Mirrored Step 0.5 + 9d into Copilot CLI SKILL.md to preserve existing byte-identity tests; this resolves deferred-item early (originally out-of-scope per REQ-008). All 95 tests in tests/commands/ pass.

Added parse_halt_block and parse_tally_line to step0_5_parser.py. Added 12 D-check promotion tests covering D2 ProvisionalTier from range (4-6 hours, 2 entities = Tier 2), D8 halt block parser with field/trigger validation, D10/D11 metrics tally line parser with state/trigger consistency. 6 LLM-required dynamic checks (D1, D6, D7, D9, D12, D13, D14) flagged for ADR-057 eval harness follow-on. tests/commands/: 107 pass. M1-M5 all complete.

REQ-008 implementation complete. 9 commits on feat/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate. Spec.md grew from 199 to 339 lines; 12 ACs delivered; 107 tests pass; Copilot CLI mirror landed; plan tracked at .agents/plans/active/req-008-step-0-5-memory-first-gate.md. Ready for /review and /ship.
